title: Is Unstructured Data The Key To Successful AI Deployments?
summary: A panel featuring Hyland executives and Erie Insurance's CIO discusses how unstructured data is foundational to successful AI deployments in enterprise settings. The discussion covers how leveraging unstructured data helps AI agents deliver real business impact where pilots and token allocation alone have failed.
writeup: The video examines why unstructured data matters for enterprise AI deployments, featuring Hyland executives and Erie Insurance's CIO. The discussion ties access to unstructured data to moving past failed AI pilots and token allotment constraints toward agentic enterprises that deliver business impact. Concepts covered include agentic workflows and agent memory.
